debug_info.goal:
case some.inl
Hist : History
L R : List Formula
nlf : NegLoadFormula
nbas : ¬Sequent.basic (L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf))
lt : LocalTableau (L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf))
nrep : ¬rep Hist (L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf))
next : (Y : Sequent) → Y ∈ endNodesOf lt → Tableau ((L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf)) :: Hist) Y
LY RY : List Formula
nlfY : NegLoadFormula
Y_in : (LY, RY, some (Sum.inl nlfY)) ∈ endNodesOf lt.flip.flip
Yf_in : Sequent.flip (LY, RY, some (Sum.inl nlfY)) ∈ endNodesOf lt.flip
e :
  PathIn
    (⋯ ▸
      (next
          (match Sequent.flip (LY, RY, some (Sum.inl nlfY)) with
          | (L, R, O) => (R, L, Option.map Sum.swap O))
          ⋯).flip)
e_in :
  e ∈
    exitsOf ((R, L, some (Sum.inr nlf)) :: List.map Sequent.flip Hist) (Sequent.flip (LY, RY, some (Sum.inl nlfY)))
      (⋯ ▸
        (next
            (match Sequent.flip (LY, RY, some (Sum.inl nlfY)) with
            | (L, R, O) => (R, L, Option.map Sum.swap O))
            ⋯).flip)
⊢ ∃ a,
    ∃ (h : a ∈ endNodesOf lt),
      ∃ a_1 ∈ exitsOf ((L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf)) :: Hist) a (next a ⋯), PathIn.loc ⋯ a_1 = ⋯ ▸ (PathIn.loc ⋯ e).flip
